column3: Ginger Tea is a hot beverage prepared by steeping ginger root pieces in boiling water, often mixed with other ingredients like honey or lemon juice for added flavor and health benefits.
Ginger Powder is finely grounded dried ginger root, used for cooking and as a spice that enhances aromatic food flavor.

Ginger Tincture refers to an herbal extract derived from ginger root, which has been soaked in alcohol or a similar solvent for an extended period of time to create a concentrated and potent form of this spicy, aromatic plant.

Ginger Juice is a refreshing beverage produced from pressing or blending fresh ginger root, which has been used for centuries as a popular ingredient in various cuisines and traditional medicines due to its numerous health benefits.

Ginger Pills/Tablets is a type of supplement or medication derived from the root of the ginger plant, used for various health benefits such as relieving nausea, reducing inflammation, and alleviating pain.

Ginger Oil is an essential oil extracted from the rhizome of the ginger plant, which offers numerous health benefits and is commonly used for its therapeutic properties due to containing strong antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds.

Ginger Capsules is a supplement that consists of ground ginger root enclosed in a small capsule, which can be consumed for various health benefits such as relieving nausea, aiding digestion, and reducing inflammation.

Ginger Extracts is a concentrated form of ginger, derived from the root of the ginger plant, which contains various beneficial compounds like antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents that are utilized for their therapeutic properties in food and medicinal preparations.

Ginger Essential Oil is an extracted concentrated liquid from the ginger plant, which possesses a strong aroma and various therapeutic properties that can be utilized for different purposes such as health benefits and relaxation due to its unique chemical composition derived directly from its rhizome.

Ginger Syrup is a delicious sweetener made from ginger root, sugar, and other spices that can be used as an alternative to regular sugar in various beverages such as mocktails, teas, and even for culinary purposes.
